# mtncloud_monitoring_group (Resource)

Manages an MTN Cloud monitoring check group: several checks rolled up to one health status (healthy while at least `min_happy` members are happy).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# A check group: several checks rolled up to one health status.
resource "mtncloud_monitoring_check" "home" {
  name       = "home-page"
  check_type = "webGetCheck"
  config     = jsonencode({ webUrl = "https://www.example.ng" })
}

resource "mtncloud_monitoring_group" "frontends" {
  name      = "frontends"
  min_happy = 1
  severity  = "warning"
  check_ids = [tonumber(mtncloud_monitoring_check.home.id)]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the check group.

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the check group is active.
- `check_ids` (Set of Number) IDs of the member checks. Config-authoritative: managed here, not reconciled from the API (membership changed outside Terraform is not detected as drift).
- `description` (String) Description of the check group.
- `in_uptime` (Boolean) Whether this group affects account-wide availability calculations.
- `min_happy` (Number) Minimum number of member checks that must be happy to keep the group healthy.
- `severity` (String) Maximum severity this group can incur when failing (e.g. `info`, `warning`, `critical`).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the check group.
